title: xorshift64 PRNG (basket stress driver)
statement: From docs/basket/spec-allocator.md §4.1 (xorshift64, Marsaglia). Define `fn xs_next(state: u64) -> u64` computing: `x := state; x := x ^ (x << 13); x := x ^ (x >> 7); x := x ^ (x << 17); return x`. All arithmetic is mod 2^64, so the shifts/xors run in a `wrapping {}` regime (an unwrapped `<<` that overflows would fault). Define only this function.
